n: Vale of Sorcery: The Trial of Wrath

steps.t: Injured Orcs can be found upon the Circle of Wrath in Minas Morgul. You should question those Orcs that you have injured.
A group of Orcs found the artifact you seek and left the city. You should track the group of Orcs as they make their way towards Nurn.
Thurindol can be found at Echad Uial. You should talk to Thurindol.
